reason: A separately owned, accepted PixEagle public demo was active on the same host; the updater correctly requires every known PixEagle runtime path to be stopped before source or dependency changes.
followup: The accepted clean-clone handoff walkthrough used --skip-update-check and passed 23/23 commands. Repeat the updater dry-run only after the maintainer has finished the public demo and the owned runtime is stopped; do not weaken lifecycle detection or interrupt the active tester bench for this preflight.
claim_boundary: This is evidence of a correct fail-closed refusal, not an updater success result and not Raspberry Pi execution evidence.
